sessions.title: My Sessions
sessions.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this session?

newSession.title: New Session
newSession.videoDescription: Upload the medical consultation video for processing
newSession.additionalInfoDescription: These fields are optional but help organize sessions

upload.dropzone: Drag a video or audio file, or click to select
upload.acceptedFormats: Video: MP4, WebM, MOV, AVI, MKV | Audio: MP3, M4A, WAV, OGG (up to 500MB)

simulator.title: Session Simulator
simulator.contextDescription: Describe the medical consultation scenario you want to simulate
simulator.contextPlaceholder: E.g.: 45-year-old patient presents with back pain for 3 days. Patient has history of herniated disc. Doctor should examine, diagnose and propose treatment.
simulator.voicesDescription: Select the voice for each participant in the simulation

progress.title: Generating simulation
progress.description: The conversation and audio are being generated. This may take a few minutes.

processing.title: Processing session
processing.description: Your video is being processed. This may take a few minutes.

sectionDescriptions.introduction: Initial greeting and introduction between healthcare professional and patient
sectionDescriptions.symptoms: Patient describes symptoms, discomfort or reason for consultation
sectionDescriptions.diagnosis: Healthcare professional evaluates and communicates diagnosis or possible diagnoses
sectionDescriptions.treatment: Treatment instructions, medication, lifestyle changes or recommendations
sectionDescriptions.closing: Consultation closing, next steps and farewell

accuracy.title: Transcription Accuracy
accuracy.textSimilarityTooltip: Percentage of words correctly transcribed. Calculated as 1 minus the Word Error Rate (WER), which measures insertions, deletions and substitutions. E.g.: if the original text has 100 words and there were 5 errors (misspelled, omitted or added words), the similarity is 95%.
accuracy.speakerAccuracyTooltip: Accuracy in identifying who is speaking. Compares the word distribution per speaker between the original and transcribed text. E.g.: if the doctor said 100 words and 95 were correctly attributed to them, the accuracy for that speaker is 95%.
accuracy.wordErrorRateTooltip: WER = (Substitutions + Deletions + Insertions) / Total original words. A WER of 0% means perfect transcription. E.g.: if out of 100 words there are 2 substituted, 1 deleted and 2 inserted, the WER is 5%.

users.title: User Management
users.name: Name
users.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
users.protectedUserRole: The admin user role cannot be modified

permissions.noWriteAccess: You do not have permission to perform this action

consultationSummary.title: Patient Consultation Summary
consultationSummary.notGenerated: Summary could not be generated automatically. You can try regenerating it.
consultationSummary.errorGenerating: Error generating consultation summary. Please try again.
consultationSummary.disclaimer: This summary was generated by AI and is intended for informational purposes only. It does not replace professional medical advice. Always consult your healthcare provider for any questions about your health.

patientPage.title: Your Consultation Summary
patientPage.expiredDescription: This share link has expired or been revoked. Please ask your healthcare provider for a new link.
patientPage.notFoundDescription: This link is invalid or the consultation summary could not be found.
patientPage.disclaimer: This summary was generated by AI and is intended for informational purposes only. It does not replace professional medical advice. Always consult your healthcare provider for any questions about your health.

reportSummary.title: Report Summary
reportSummary.description: Paste a medical report to generate a patient-friendly summary
reportSummary.reportPlaceholder: Paste the doctor's medical report here...
reportSummary.errorGenerating: Error generating summary. Please try again.

file.dropzone: Drag a file here, or click to select
file.acceptedFormats: PDF, DOCX, ODT, TXT, MD, CSV and other text files (up to 10 MB)
file.fileTypeError: Unsupported file type. Please use PDF, DOCX, ODT or a text file.
file.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is 10 MB.

list.title: Previous Reports
list.emptyDescription: Generate your first report summary above
list.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this report summary?

validator.title: Safety validation
validator.notRun: Validation has not been run yet.
validator.failed: The safety validator could not produce a usable result. The sheet is hidden until validation succeeds — retry validation, or regenerate the sheet.
validator.sheetHiddenDescription: The safety validator did not complete successfully on this sheet. The patient-facing content is hidden until you retry validation. If this persists, regenerate the sheet.
validator.gateNotice: The patient cannot view this sheet until you confirm it. Confirmation also enables sharing.
validator.shareGated: Confirm the sheet to enable share-link issuance.
validator.patientViewUnavailableDescription: This sheet has not been confirmed yet, or you do not have access.

notes.glossaryTermMissing: Glossary term not found in source: "{{term}}"
